message:
fix: security and correctness fixes across API routes

- Fix timing side-channel in safeCompareTokens (permissions) and
  safeTokenEqual (support tickets): pad buffers to equal length
  before timingSafeEqual to prevent token-length leaks
- Fix sort-after-pagination in admin appeals: fetch all, sort, then
  slice to ensure correct page boundaries
- Fix sort comparator asymmetry: partition actionable appeals before
  comparing deadlines
- Fix auth.role as reviewedBy: use role:tokenPrefix for audit trail
- Fix Bearer prefix check in appeals token extraction
- Fix rate limiter peek/check boundary: align peek to use <= like check
- Fix module-level regex g flag in content-filter: inline into function
- Fix ShareDialog content type mismatch: add pack→bundle, skill→prompt
  mappings in share API CONTENT_TYPE_MAP
- Fix IP rate limit before auth in support ticket PUT: authenticate
  before consuming rate limit buckets
- Add rate limiting to history API POST endpoint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
